name: Airwallex
description: Airwallex — Global payments and financial infrastructure for cross-border transfers, multi-currency accounts, and embedded finance APIs.

seo.title: Airwallex — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Airwallex: Airwallex — Global payments and financial infrastructure for cross-border transfers, multi-currency accounts, and embedded finance APIs.

when_to_use: Multi-currency payouts to international contractors and suppliers
Embedding FX and cross-border payment APIs into fintech products
Opening multi-currency business accounts without local bank presence
Processing cross-border B2B transfers via SWIFT and local rails
White-labeling global payment infrastructure for embedded finance

review.verdict: Solid Stripe alternative for global SMBs needing real multi-currency rails, weaker for pure US merchants.
review.best_for: Cross-border SaaS and marketplaces paying contractors in 40+ currencies
review.not_for: US-only merchants who just need card acceptance with best-in-class docs

lock_in.reason: Account and payout data bound to platform; migration heavy

transparency.reason: Usage rates partly public, enterprise negotiated

developer_experience.reason: REST APIs, SDKs, test tools; strong global docs
